name: FAUCI ALERT
subject: the numbers prove it: we trust experts, not con men
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Listen up --

Donald Trump has done everything short of firing Dr. Anthony Fauci... so far. He's sidelined him, retweeted "#FireFauci," and encouraged far-right protestors to march against the doctor's guidelines.

He could be set to fire Facui any day now.

Why would Trump do this? Dr. Fauci committed the unforgivable sin of pointing out that we lost valuable time earlier this year to fight COVID-19 (time Trump spent golfing and rage tweeting).

[Not only is this dangerous, it's exactly the opposite of what the American people want from their leaders. We have to demand that Trump NOT fire Dr. Fauci, especially in the middle of a crisis.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c94/4bd7760e/5aaf90d4/77af7aaa/2873360512/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/savefauci?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Not+only+is+this+dangerous+itrsquos+exac&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci")

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c94/4bd7760e/5aaf90d4/77af7aa9/2873360512/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/savefauci?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci")
---

We don't want leaders who reject expert guidance or cut off funding to international relief efforts. In fact, Dr. Anthony Fauci polls WAY better than most elected officials [ESPECIALLY Trump], and Americans overwhelmingly would be outraged if Trump fired him.

[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c94/4bd7760e/5aaf90d4/77af7aa8/2873360512/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/savefauci?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci")
[Join us in telling Trump: DO NOT fire Dr. Fauci⭢](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c94/4bd7760e/5aaf90d4/77af7ab7/2873360512/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/savefauci?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Join+us+in+telling+Trump+DO+NOT+fire+Dr+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci")

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c94/4bd7760e/5aaf90d4/77af7ab4/2873360512/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200424_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_4_fauci")** to make a donation.

name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Finance Team
subject: FWD: reaching voters where they're at
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Digital outreach is crucial to reaching voters across the state right now with in-person campaigning suspended.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f8e/1749894580/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Did you see this message from our digital team, Peter?

Now that we've suspended all in-person campaigning, digital ads are more important than ever to our winning strategy. That's why our **[one-day goal of raising $15,000 for our Digital Ad Fund is so critical!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f83/1749894580/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.3nd__1300__&amount=10")**

Since we can't knock on their doors or have MJ travel across Texas, we need digital ads to reach voters all across the state. **[If you're able, please donate today to help us reach voters!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f83/1749894580/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.3nd__1300__&amount=10")**

Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar Digital Team**
Subject: More ads like Carpool
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f83/1749894580/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.3nd__1300__&amount=10")
> ---
> Hey Peter!
>
> With all in-person events suspended, we need your help to reach voters where they're at: ONLINE! We're proud of the ads we've run so far (remember Carpool?), but we need your help to keep it up. **[That's why today we're announcing a one-day goal of raising $15,000 for our Digital Ad Fund!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f83/1749894580/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.3nd__1300__&amount=10")**
>
> If you can, even $1 can make a big difference! With 90% of donations under $100, a few bucks here and there when you can really does add up, and they're why we can run the program we do -- **[so rush a donation now (if you can) to help us hit our one-day goal.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f81/1749894580/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.3nd__1300__&amount=1")**
>
> \-- Team MJ
>
>
>
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f83/1749894580/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.3nd__1300__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f87/1749894580/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1300&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489030e/7f51f7bc/4f2c1c69/4ef10f86/1749894580/VEsP/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas

Remember, this is her ONLY Official Birthday Card, and when you sign it, you can even leave her a personal note to read. I'm sending her the card first thing TOMORROW, so make sure you add your name NOW if you want her to see it. name: Corky Messner
subject: What's Jeanne Shaheen been up to?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Peter, Can you believe this email Jeanne Shaheen sent out for the Democratic National Committee? Not only is she signing emails for the national Democrats, but _she is PROUD to have such strong support from liberal figureheads like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer_.

That's right, the same Pelosi and Schumer who have spent the last month derailing stimulus package after stimulus package for their own political gain.

**She's already admitted that she is "vulnerable", but now she has brought in the national Democratic party to prop up her campaign, and sway this election in her favor. ** **The only winners here are the liberal elitists across the country, not the great people of New Hampshire**.

**[Will you make a contribution right now to help me fight back against Shaheen's massive out-of-state fundraising push?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c8ef21a578695fab/97bad13d1f9b65cdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

While her war chest may grow by the day from California liberals getting behind her, my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters right here in New Hampshire - and I need your help right now.

I've been holding virtual town halls and meetings almost every day, reaching out to voters, and listening to what the people of our state need. I will deliver a fresh perspective on some of the most challenging issues facing our country today, with solutions that work.

What's Jeanne Shaheen been doing? Well, she certainly hasn't been working on small business relief packages. She's been writing fundraising emails with her pals at the DNC.

**[Please, consider a contribution right now, Peter. Shaheen's inaction has already done enough damage, don't let her continue to make it worse](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c8ef21a578695fab/8c7f419ccd6923a4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

-Corky | |
---
From: Sen. Jeanne Shaheen
Date: April 21, 2020 at 3:56:34 PM EDT
To: Team Messner
Subject: Winning this Senate seat is key to flipping the Senate
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c8ef21a578695fab/991a2ee36f3c1b43c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
I'm counting on your support to hold a Democratic Senate seat in New Hampshire. Give me a moment to explain why it is so critical to our mission to flip the Senate and help a Democratic president govern:

Donald Trump and the GOP know that New Hampshire is crucial to Senate control – and Democrats can’t take back the Senate without winning in New Hampshire, so the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. New Hampshire is no stranger to close races -- I won in 2014 by 3.3 points and in 2016 Sen. Maggie Hassan won by just a tenth of a point -- and Washington Republicans are ready to spend millions to win this razor-thin race.

**We’re coming up short of where we need to be to stay on track to win in New Hampshire and take back control of the Senate -- so I'm counting on this grassroots team to come together right now:**

**Split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today to protect New Hampshire’s Senate seat and flip the Senate for Democrats.**

Failing to take control of the Senate this year could mean giving Mitch McConnell two more years of power to attack affordable health care, confirm young conservative judges, and chip away at our voting rights. It means that even if we win the presidency and maintain our House majority, a McConnell-led Senate will hold any chance of Democratic policy-making hostage. Your support today is critical to making sure that doesn't happen.

**This election is going to be a competitive, uphill battle, Todd, and I can't win and help Democrats take back the Senate without you and a strong, grassroots organization by my side.**

Democrats need to flip just four seats to win control of the Senate, but that math requires Democrats to hold incumbent Democratic seats – and the GOP is doing everything they can to make sure I lose. One of my Republican opponents has personally invested more than $3 million into this race. I'm not exaggerating when I tell you that I'm counting on a groundswell of support from fellow Democrats like you to hold New Hampshire's seat so I can continue fighting for working Granite Staters and American families nationwide.

**If you can, split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC. Together, we can flip the Senate and elect Democrats nationwide.**

Jeanne

Jeanne Shaheen
U.S. Senator, New Hampshire
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c8ef21a578695fab/29cc22be3d102b1ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c8ef21a578695fab/640abcdd7364f032c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Well, she certainly hasn't been working on small business relief packages. She's been writing fundraising emails with her pals at the DNC. . -Corky | | From: Sen. Jeanne Shaheen Date: April 21, 2020 at 3:56:34 PM EDT To: Team Messner Subject: Winning this Senate seat is key to flipping the Senate I'm counting on your support to hold a Democratic Senate seat in New Hampshire. Give me a moment to explain why it is so critical to our mission to flip the Senate and help a Democratic president govern: Donald Trump and the GOP know that New Hampshire is crucial to Senate control – and Democrats can’t take back the Senate without winning in New Hampshire, so the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. New Hampshire is no stranger to close races -- I won in 2014 by 3.3 points and in 2016 Sen. Maggie Hassan won by just a tenth of a point -- and Washington Republicans are ready to spend millions to win this razor-thin race. We’re coming up short of where we need to be to stay on track to win in New Hampshire and take back control of the Senate -- so I'm counting on this grassroots team to come together right now: Split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today to protect New Hampshire’s Senate seat and flip the Senate for Democrats. Failing to take control of the Senate this year could mean giving Mitch McConnell two more years of power to attack affordable health care, confirm young conservative judges, and chip away at our voting rights. It means that even if we win the presidency and maintain our House majority, a McConnell-led Senate will hold any chance of Democratic policy-making hostage. Your support today is critical to making sure that doesn't happen. This election is going to be a competitive, uphill battle, Todd, and I can't win and help Democrats take back the Senate without you and a strong, grassroots organization by my side. Democrats need to flip just four seats to win control of the Senate, but that math requires Democrats to hold incumbent Democratic seats – and the GOP is doing everything they can to make sure I lose. One of my Republican opponents has personally invested more than $3 million into this race. I'm not exaggerating when I tell you that I'm counting on a groundswell of support from fellow Democrats like you to hold New Hampshire's seat so I can continue fighting for working Granite Staters and American families nationwide. If you can, split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC. Together, we can flip the Senate and elect Democrats nationwide. Jeanne Jeanne Shaheen U.S. Senator, New Hampshire | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: New support for workers and families
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
One of the most heartbreaking realities of this crisis is the fact that those who can least afford it are being hit the hardest. Today I'd like to share with you some of the actions that we're taking to protect families and workers from the economic effects of this pandemic.
Too many Rhode Islanders have found themselves out of work and struggling to make ends meet. Thankfully, more than 20 financial institutions in our state have stepped up and pledged the following relief to their residential borrowers:

* A 90-day grace period for all residential mortgage payments for individuals impacted by COVID-19, with the opportunity to request additional relief
* An agreement to not report late payments to credit reporting agencies for residential borrowers who take advantage of this relief
* A 60-day moratorium on initiating residential foreclosures and evictions; and
* An agreement to waive mortgage-related late fees.

DFinancial institutions of all sizes have signed this pledge--from our state's largest banks to our valued neighborhood credit unions, and I could not be more grateful to each and every one of them. For a full list of participating institutions and more details, visit the [DBR website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E3449wlx-jhLI2T6_b88dfkluEdiwPHPAYoq0M2lsvL2OGKecvpCIfPHC2_rh-hf-jGJvJNHZPb6ZUQscZ0c6tANg=&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E34xrciqICglNcEf5cfeyz45IC-Ohh4SxUVQZMEBU8ZgXM70k3pWT4dJHKvAmYGT7s5JDpwz4M18moJN-cMSt941g9f6WKwVv4HInC3GLP343txCRZ8bHvgnJLwxOnmaRMlKZjZnMvczF5hCdTXcq6vIM=&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E34xrciqICglNcEf5cfeyz45IC-Ohh4SxUVQZMEBU8ZgXM70k3pWT4dJHKvAmYGT7s5JDpwz4M18moJN-cMSt941g9f6WKwVv4HInC3GLP343txCRZ8bHvgnJLwxOnmaRMlKZjZnMvczF5hCdTXcq6vIM=&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| The first of the month is looming for many renters in our state. Courts will not process evictions at this time, but I know that does not fully alleviate the anxiety many Rhode Islanders are feeling. To that end, my administration is making available $1.5 million in relief to low-income renters across the state. Applications will open next Thursday, and I'll share more details in the coming days.
We also know that many of our frontline workers are low-wage employees. So today, I'm announcing a Congregate Care Workforce Stabilization Fund for private providers. For the next month, this fund will provide temporary pay increases to low-wage frontline workers at eligible Medicaid-funded residential facilities. Qualifying employees will be eligible for up to a $200 increase each week from May 4 to June 1.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E3449wlx-jhLI2vzDncRMJyVrLpvtXw153A80NRw833ePkH9CKt5YR5r4U2rIY-iiahRXg_OqihnMm7NSrgX62xh0LGDzhQCceO1uKUyiNhYfd9cXuBM5AYvKJ_ngAm4_RmO5WavsX05kSIeeaYWwI7BzCBBNe2uEUEAw40QQNPX3D&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==)
---
| Finally, I want to take a minute to talk about something that's a bit difficult. Right now, we're telling everyone to stay home, but we know home isn't a safe place for everyone. Unfortunately, we've seen a major spike in the number of domestic violence 911 calls since this pandemic began. My team has worked with advocates to put together a comprehensive resource document that's [available on the Department of Health's website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E3449wlx-jhLI23y6xOQWIDzxFwmaPTt6pqoXYf1qG5dWIJmb42zGfdrDRXLP5bu_Se6Vc2eLZDWLdYnKiK2K4fkJn1L32UsMHqMaMcVUTB7Bx&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==) in English and Spanish.
We need to do more. Next Thursday at 11 a.m., I'll be joined by Senator Reed, Senator Whitehouse, Congressman Langevin, Congressman Cicilline, Attorney General Neronha, members of my Cabinet and representatives from the advocate community for a Violence Prevention Facebook Town Hall.
This is an opportunity to share critical violence prevention and identification tips and answer your questions. We all need to be able to identify the signs and know where to turn if we suspect a coworker, friend, neighbor--or even complete stranger--is experiencing violence. You can [submit your questions on Facebook [facebook.com]](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E3449wlx-jhLI2PuJRlSWQxmr5G9-I-yWFrFaWMcolqQA2vYssiVnXBX3jEQl5N-VJiAOgarUsfx53dV18wfAYSKCt60V8ui9awjSz5YzicErwFzqxKgcDjJ41FtVrWLEYmQi5fBW7M_IgZrHARVI-t2gNsi9SIBO2u4GwVLiZU7MTalMLoifiJ2RS9gkQlETMVEipZ2aNm7TBalgh-4ktFcyq2rz2kvJSYqyhdUo8rWOPIuQvqkWA3M3e2JTlAOnaArOKhu66PV67QuOaCV-OXRkheyAVkAAutBZT4n59V2OpNa8ilhGLuuMAg0ESwahWmdZhXYAHYlvg6iLadiyliZkGndnLSj6HAawOG3sp08DN2o_E5y6HtiUxjeIvWNlTl3DJ6BAjKVMjfsHowonElcVUNgdB2wyQXwSr6mF1op5rRZLqs1BzX67F0LQBEVgWbQ==&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==) and we'll answer as many as we can during the Town Hall. To ask anonymously, email [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) and request that we not use your name.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YR_zPTh4O1gcZhL0rDCFUny7P1yIWEWqAWcHaYGTsJJGReW8w4E3449wlx-jhLI23uD2xyLaiODZ70Xa5dzehIsMo-pYT9h-aBqGMVtPxmDvbDsG-v_1EELDRi2SqilJtpmMqXUAT4KNbBcJaSbZnAXyMSVVAm-mOSTtVEvhj3Re6vBdixdEAZTdkw161vt1qYrT8gJ5TcERouUGLfL6yfQbIfnb1mGJC0Xt7XvoHj4M06ZIpLQZDd1egVKWd7-QoyEcjyFhv81M9bmPiIouSqCkSLhzXp_k3C3JLkiIFbZX6Z-pAfqhg82ezkDuOznhLYo2RixrwUk=&c=J9TpR0aBZ948NLnzNTqGZ2YiPf8FDa2lXgF1dyDVxaAjE2gmCC8asA==&ch=MYyC79gk6doUpntdo1BpYd4hrCQJu7hM-CN_5RXiRJ26KnNxSIpniw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to the 2020 Presidential Defense Fund to defend your President from the Democrats’ latest Witch Hunt. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT When will it end? Nancy and her puppets are going to use this new ‘investigative committee’ to smear me and my Administration with partisan attacks right before the 2020 Election. Our Nation is coming together and becoming stronger than ever before, and I will NOT allow another partisan witch hunt to undo everything we’ve accomplished. I want to know who stood with me during this critical time. My team is sending me a list of everyone who contributed to our urgent 2020 Presidential Defense Fund. I know you won’t let me down. Please contribute to our 2020 Presidential Defense Fund by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to get on the list my team sends me. Together, we are USA Strong, and together, we will prevail. Donald J. Trump President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17262650/188379505/-1907457918?refcode=04032020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjYzZWNhNC0wYzg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W6sNvCUAMAx91VGRUVy-sWlLYgf_I3FR_f358MRmE6c=)
---
Dear Friend, The sudden economic shock of the COVID-19 pandemic has led to a huge increase in food insecurity. Texans are going hungry, and that's not acceptable. We're lucky in our household. Sarah and I can both work remotely, so we're doing what we can to help by supporting local businesses and contributing to area food banks. We hope you can, too. You can find a list of food banks in Central Texas counties on our web site [https://rickkennedyforcongress.com/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17262651/188379506/-1503508973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjYzZWNhNC0wYzg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W6sNvCUAMAx91VGRUVy-sWlLYgf_I3FR_f358MRmE6c=&emci=268c6258-f686-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1f63eca4-0c87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10438639). Just click on the COVID-19 Services and Information link. Winning this seat is important. But so is doing what we can to ease the suffering of those directly impacted by this crisis. clean_body: | = Dear Friend, The sudden economic shock of the COVID-19 pandemic has led to a huge increase in food insecurity. Texans are going hungry, and that's not acceptable. We're lucky in our household. Sarah and I can both work remotely, so we're doing what we can to help by supporting local businesses and contributing to area food banks. We hope you can, too. You can find a list of food banks in Central Texas counties on our web site . Just click on the COVID-19 Services and Information link. Winning this seat is important. But so is doing what we can to ease the suffering of those directly impacted by this crisis. If you can, = as well so we can do both. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Stay safe, and thank you. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Breaking Election News >> Help me get the word out!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/thd-_FpXXcwagY0squm7tFFG5SD5YdE1fZCI7CPZ5HU=)

Peter,

BREAKING ELECTION NEWS: Governor Cuomo just announced that absentee ballot applications will be mailed to all eligible New York voters ahead of the June 23rd primary.

**That means if you 're a registered Democrat in the state of New York, a postage-paid absentee ballot application will be sent to the address where you're registered before the June elections.**

Our state is taking the necessary precautions to ensure that people can safely exercise their right to vote -- and I need your help to get the word out. **[Will you rush in a donation today to help us reach our supporters and make sure they know about this critical update?](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/Ec__xcj1-FmVReWOgnFmjUbrjQUm0dQrVQhy8RibGdY=)**

**[->Your $200 contribution today will help get our digital ads in front of all our supporters](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/Ec__xcj1-FmVReWOgnFmjUbrjQUm0dQrVQhy8RibGdY=?amount=200)**
**[->Your $100 contribution today will help boost our direct mail program, so we can connect with every registered Democrat](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/Ec__xcj1-FmVReWOgnFmjUbrjQUm0dQrVQhy8RibGdY=?amount=100)**
**[->Your $50 contribution today will help us reach all of our social media followers to share this important news](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/Ec__xcj1-FmVReWOgnFmjUbrjQUm0dQrVQhy8RibGdY=?amount=50)**
**[-> Or, just chip in whatever you can today and help us get the word out](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/Ec__xcj1-FmVReWOgnFmjUbrjQUm0dQrVQhy8RibGdY=)**

We have just under two months to go until Primary Day, and every single minute counts. **[Donate $200, $100, or $50 today so that we can give every voter the information they need to cast their ballot safely and securely.](https://act.myngp.com/el/E47ELTaDVKsY7txhuFYumsrGHXCjmcbNMRT2m8K-3Bc=/Ec__xcj1-FmVReWOgnFmjUbrjQUm0dQrVQhy8RibGdY=)**

Best,
Adem

|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263144/188385019/-300075527?refcode=HIC_20200425_em_eom1_fr_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2E3NzQ3Yy0wZTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=McR8iVL6exkcSZD0KbxbG3uflV8M60ZJexCC-VUtC2M=)

| Dear friends, It seems like just yesterday we kicked off our campaign, but we’ve come so far, and now we’re less than 200 days away from Election Day. [_**Can you chip in $5 or $10 to help keep our momentum going?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263145/188385020/-300075527?amount=5&refcode=HIC_20200425_em_eom1_fr_all_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2E3NzQ3Yy0wZTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=McR8iVL6exkcSZD0KbxbG3uflV8M60ZJexCC-VUtC2M=) Since Day 1, our campaign has been about taking the voices of Kentucky’s working families to Washington, changing the system so it works for regular folks. And the best way we can do that? By rejecting corporate PAC and special interest money and building a grassroots movement to flip this district — $5 and $10 at a time. **Together, with the help of hard-working supporters like you, we have built this campaign from an early idea into a movement.** My team and I are so proud of the work we’ve done so far — and proud you’re on our team. | Relief for Granite Staters in a global pandemic By: Sens. Sharon Carson and Regina Birdsell
GRANITE Staters are living in unprecedented times. For the first time in our nation’s history, every state is under a disaster declaration by the federal government. Governor Chris Sununu has issued a stay-at-home order until May 4th while allowing essential services such as supermarkets, pharmacies and gas stations to remain open. Just one month ago New Hampshire had a record low unemployment rate, but now more than 100,000 of our friends and neighbors are out of work. But thanks to the hard work of Gov. Sununu and President Trump, help is on the way and some relief will be felt by people who have lost jobs and small businesses that have closed to help fight the spread of the coronavirus. Congress passed and President Trump signed a $2 trillion stimulus package into law providing relief to Granite Staters and our small businesses. One of the most critical aspects of the stimulus bill is the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), which provides a direct incentive for small businesses to keep workers on their payrolls. Any business with 500 or fewer employees that was affected by the coronavirus may be eligible to file for benefits through the Payment Protection Program through their local banks. The SBA will forgive loans if all employees are kept on the payroll for eight weeks and the money is used for payroll, rent, mortgage interest or utilities. Unemployment insurance is another resource for people who find themselves currently without work. Due to high demand, the Department of Employment Security has set up a schedule to file claims by the letter of your last name. For that information and to apply for unemployment insurance please visit [nhes.nh.gov.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA3MTg1NTMzODU1MDc4MDY4JmM9ajRiNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDE0NDY4ODImZD14MGc4dDVp.1hUMcwTm_G6l8AlqYeM9yWtH1jABEP6Kc84kwMKhnKE) The federal CARES Act includes $250 billion to enhance unemployment benefits. This includes an additional $600 per week for all individuals filing for unemployment in New Hampshire through July 31st. Governor Sununu also has raised the minimum state benefit to $168 per week and eliminated the one-week waiting period to apply. Through an executive order, Governor Sununu also has temporarily waived the requirement for claimants to search for work while they are unemployed. Unemployment eligibility has been expanded to the self-employed and those who need to take time off from work to care for a child who is now out of school. However, to continue to receive benefits everyone must still file a weekly claim. The governor continues to do a great job fighting for Granite Staters and advocating on our behalf. Because of his coordination with President Trump, the federal delegation, state agencies and neighboring states, New Hampshire is in a better position to come out of this pandemic earlier and with fewer deaths than originally predicted. Granite Staters are doing a tremendous job to help prevent the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve as well. Practicing social distancing, wearing a mask in public and following the advice of the CDC and health care professionals has put us in a position to hopefully see progress in our fight against the coronavirus. It is not easy to stay home for days on end while isolating from our friends and loved ones, but it is important. This is how we will be able to more quickly resume normalcy in our daily lives. We could not win this fight without the selfless dedication of our health care workers and first responders, who are putting their own health on the line for us. We owe them our true gratitude. We also cannot forget the people who are working in pharmacies, grocery stores, truckers who keep our supply chain intact and businesses that have shifted their focus to manufacture personal protective gear to keep Granite Staters safe. Watching members of our communities coming together for each other has been inspirational. The countless people who are sewing masks for each other to wear in public, donating food to first responders and buying groceries for the elderly exhibits the generosity of our Granite State family. It was heartfelt to see children look on in joy as they were able to see the Easter Bunny on Sunday morning, making their Easter a little more special. These activities give us hope that we will get out of this pandemic together. And there is a light at the end of this tunnel. New York, the nation’s epicenter of the pandemic, has seen a flattening of new hospitalizations and confirmed coronavirus cases. There are signs that we may begin to see fewer daily confirmed cases as well. However, we must remain vigilant and take the advice of health care experts, including safe social distancing to ensure we see the end of this global pandemic. Sen. Sharon Carson (R) represents District 14 and lives in Londonderry. Sen. Regina Birdsell (R) represents District 19 and lives in Hampstead.

body:
I just spoke with my finance director and we are $3,405 short of where we need to be to reach our end-of-month goal. We are only 5 days away from our critical end of month fundraising goal. If 350 American patriots chip in $10 by MIDNIGHT tonight we will be well on our way to ensuring that we hit our fundraising goals.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dI7tkIloIhuwn5VnLf-O-3kuHCPcWFV-ADgSiZG-TUn6_70iVFTcJ_3Nl6kdLyq6-ZxPSyOASq8wo1yFwk0zw4dVWw1YQdUON2R1yDU6MhmhEvg3VAc8_5dKL1-yFJAPzG74sVR2RuJe3236hJMRoGnissnscur4-Q8vaS3rFfC0CBmhvn6-rN-k85n0aNimM0boae5JylBWPcMRN3yAsDn-Kd0zoTvDpQEKNGqzNzJ8tnaWzl-az0hxYklOP1lXHwqj_kPwajaLPOS5PmdwJfCjp-Gv1IIRwPs-V7CVW6AYjd0KBYlDX5G0IFnGDAWaZaF6bbVYpepjGArD_hRhKpiZQwXtbowsyqEBSRi4xNsQswwLm-_yRPFZYSZUQFV&c=-4aQVeBRBrui6hhbjyEKyCYQC7YyChoHrhscBRaSz_Loh4M_34ccFQ==&ch=mCBlf543_45m4u7NC_mZqrgSkZCF7XbMnGYPgob8ghG7iuDMaY61WA==)
Friend,

Friend, There are only five more days left in April, which means that there are only five more days until our critical fundraising deadline is here. This is the first full month of our campaign being entirely digital, and unfortunately, we've still not raised what we need to reach the fundraising goal we've set for this month. name: Charles Booker
subject: For the second time:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I'm proud to be a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate.
#
This week, I received the Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate of Distinction award – for the second time in my career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263608/188401443/-608480647?refcode=em20200425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=)
As a survivor of gun violence and as a State Representative, I've been on the front lines demanding gun safety for years. I couldn't be more proud to earn this distinction once again.
I'm confident we can win gun safety in Washington – but I can't get there without your help. **[So can you chip in $5 to our campaign today? Your donation, along with Moms Demand Action's support, will keep our movement for real, progressive change going strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263622/188401457/-608480647?refcode=em20200425&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263623/188401458/-608480647?refcode=em20200425&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=)****
Since I was young, my life has been colored by gun violence. I've lost family members because of it, like my cousin TJ. He was murdered just blocks away from my Senate campaign headquarters in Louisville on Easter Sunday in 2016.
I carry the trauma of these experiences with me daily, but I work to turn that trauma into inspiration. I work to lead on common-sense gun safety because I don't want to see others losing family members to gun violence, too.
We need more leaders that have lived the struggle – that are living it – in the U.S. Senate. We need leaders that can talk about issues that regular people face regardless of where they're from. I've been doing that in the Kentucky General Assembly since 2018.
And now, I'm ready to take my experiences to Washington. **[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots, people-centered campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263637/188401472/-608480647?refcode=em20200425&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263638/188401473/-608480647?refcode=em20200425&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=)****
I know firsthand how important it is to have candidates that will stand with moral clarity and fight for bold, progressive change. It is always an honor, a privilege, and a responsibility to stand on the front lines with folks like yourself.
Together, I know we can do this, and create a brighter future for all.
Onward,
Charles

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263639/188401474/-608480647?refcode=em20200425-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263640/188401475/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=&emci=595f7bb7-1087-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8b63aef8-1487-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263641/188401476/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=&emci=595f7bb7-1087-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8b63aef8-1487-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17263642/188401477/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYzYWVmOC0xNDg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC-8FJl7EM2caCjrRW3U0HYcZEH5AiUBMexeVHrgaok=&emci=595f7bb7-1087-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8b63aef8-1487-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)

| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Even though many schools are only teaching online due to the recent national emergency, Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the fall especially in 2020, a critical year for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy this election year we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dh2-0XNmSz-QgLZxIzC-LFl8t5LdzpX_m1258E5zxxbqqoz7c7w2rcLBBMz0AMgim8JO77rb0R_4z--GV0LKtvHpPPO9BATZQMm3BfANsM4gqa0aJgtBMEm9YrurmDtoR9cZSc44Qq0MEZvuWMXB1Tli2lLbNb9d68iHebklP4HN9McXdXDwl1RxRerzR3SjYjxbu7TiQ_bcADPdS9I6OIflUeXD5EMrlg9kK3Opm62fIinZcH96g4kESLaSOTphl4Z3bdpdAJW-UpQ2ZX7SAWJNMH-h3AoxjK5dSL3NJZqqymlNr4LOrlZv9rgxB4lfF2nE8yReAkNoOs3qEGB9LsnVIZShRekJ8UzLbY0oBHdwEbUi4nL78tvWOeKFxTqhoawQIKVyv6M1CW5X4QVXzA==&c=J1miFRLh_rZ35q5fUuT7TIkT8KB6kDUrh0Fe1nZfGyCnJiiDaKVEGg==&ch=SfgTzjA7CJHOXHhnJL_Why6GSZ985eo4TLQl4m6Mt8DAuCM4F0MVLA==) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dh2-0XNmSz-QgLZxIzC-LFl8t5LdzpX_m1258E5zxxbqqoz7c7w2rcLBBMz0AMgim8JO77rb0R_4z--GV0LKtvHpPPO9BATZQMm3BfANsM4gqa0aJgtBMEm9YrurmDtoR9cZSc44Qq0MEZvuWMXB1Tli2lLbNb9d68iHebklP4HN9McXdXDwl1RxRerzR3SjYjxbu7TiQ_bcADPdS9I6OIflUeXD5EMrlg9kK3Opm62fIinZcH96g4kESLaSOTphl4Z3bdpdAJW-UpQ2ZX7SAWJNMH-h3AoxjK5dSL3NJZqqymlNr4LOrlZv9rgxB4lfF2nE8yReAkNoOs3qEGB9LsnVIZShRekJ8UzLbY0oBHdwEbUi4nL78tvWOeKFxTqhoawQIKVyv6M1CW5X4QVXzA==&c=J1miFRLh_rZ35q5fUuT7TIkT8KB6kDUrh0Fe1nZfGyCnJiiDaKVEGg==&ch=SfgTzjA7CJHOXHhnJL_Why6GSZ985eo4TLQl4m6Mt8DAuCM4F0MVLA==) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Save the United States Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc424/2a380d31/22009bcc/f083c7/3274467279/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc424/2a380d31/22009bcc/f083c7/3274467279/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there --
The United States Postal Service could run out of money as soon as September if Donald Trump refuses to authorize emergency relief. If that happens, our country's postal system could collapse.
A crumbling postal service could mean job losses and wage cuts for postal workers across the country, reduced services to rural areas, and a dramatic impact on our elections as COVID-19 pushes us toward vote by mail.
[**We need 5,000 signatures to tell Donald Trump to protect the USPS and save thousands of essential workers ' jobs. Please add your name right away.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc424/2a380d31/22009bcc/f083c0/3274467279/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202004_saveusps?source=e20200425_usps1_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Letter carriers and postal workers are on the front lines, putting themselves at risk to keep Americans connected, supplied, and safe. It's absolutely critical that we keep the USPS and all of its workers functioning smoothly and safely through this crisis and through the November election.
[**Please sign the petition calling on the Trump administration to fund the United States Postal Service and to stop using this essential service as a political bargaining chip.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc424/2a380d31/22009bcc/f083c0/3274467279/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202004_saveusps?source=e20200425_usps1_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc424/2a380d31/22009bcc/f083c1/3274467279/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDQyNV9zYXZldXNwczFfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200425_saveusps1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc424/2a380d31/22009bcc/f083c2/3274467279/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| | Hey there, it's Brittany. I'm Nikki Foster's campaign manager, and after Nikki is done making calls to voters, **I have to let her know how our fundraising 's going.** [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1") Here's what the finance team just sent to me. Honestly, it's not what we were hoping for. **We 're fighting against one of Trump's top cronies (and his millions in dark money) in a competitive race where working families are on the line -- and our election has been completely rewritten at the last second.** In order to rise to this occasion, we need you. We have to make sure our entirely-by-mail election is working for everyone -- and we have to do so before Tuesday. **[Please, will you pitch in today and help us persevere in this momentous fight? ANYTHING you're able to contribute will help us immensely -- and help put a smile on Nikki's face when I give her this report.](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Please+will+you+pitch+in+today+and+help+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1")** | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200425_BrittanyUpdate_U2_X1")

clean_body: | "" | | Hey there, it's Brittany. I'm Nikki Foster's campaign manager, and after Nikki is done making calls to voters, I have to let her know how our fundraising 's going. "" Here's what the finance team just sent to me. Honestly, it's not what we were hoping for. We 're fighting against one of Trump's top cronies (and his millions in dark money) in a competitive race where working families are on the line -- and our election has been completely rewritten at the last second. In order to rise to this occasion, we need you. We have to make sure our entirely-by-mail election is working for everyone -- and we have to do so before Tuesday. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thanks so much, Brittany | | Nikki Foster is a US Air Force veteran, a working mom, and a Democrat running for Congress in Ohio's 1st congressional district. name: Greg Gianforte
subject: We can't afford to fall behind!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG FOR MONTANA, REPUBLICAN
body:
As a result of our campaign being entirely digital for this first full month and having no in person campaign events, we need a surge of support this weekend to close the gap.
Friend,
I just got off the phone with my campaign staff and they just informed me that if we're unable to reach our critical monthly fundraising goal by April 30th at 11:59 PM, we run the risk of falling behind at a critical juncture of this campaign.
As a result of our campaign being entirely digital for this first full month and having no in person campaign events, we need a surge of support this weekend to close the gap.
That's why I'm reaching out to you. I know that I've been able to count on your incredible support in the past. [_**Are you able to step up again today?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ws-9nCT8N3bA5ZoOM7hTatERyDH7nWdhT9XSjK-g4Ut_4Y9H76hLC9S4wcrVAgwsMOHJD9EwFAHMRdlPtYOi22dNJn8tS_-9IhxurpoojZgdgZreWOwjavgwAmYMtZ9hMsQ220sJKqxpFvNiOxbgrxHdAQ62ybBDstl7Jk8hmE6WIhEQV3iUb-xgc47INv2ykrZcise0Vx8aux6hQCrGdlMWNW4LS5UaJq8ryLCGYlTnXIBPWs2VNUYL8bbLb6DGNP02Rem04GygZkk2z2ams0Ns4FFTIOxskDWAGtnqq6haJFoQXzN7sSAwoGSu-Q6bL3DOT-EpRgo0W1sXMpDUHyH52XEnMyeciVrjpXU3zHHxDhSIA_dBRg==&c=1zimPxHMJcXLlfbNkFIgbYqy8KlDmx_A2ycLVl2KF6AvhBx7ylGBjg==&ch=19r4BWCPncqMAzrpSlt5K0moP3tYUGy6sDoHsJ_-WppXvhZV37DT2w==)

We can't afford to fall behind. Right now is a key moment in our race. National Democrat party leaders like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are pulling out all the stops to put their allies in control of Montana. Even Hillary Clinton is weighing in. She recently held a virtual fundraiser for one of my radical opponents.
We must hold the line against these Democrats if we want to protect our Montana way of life for the future!

body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw John's email below.
President Trump is putting AMERICA FIRST in his decision to withhold WHO funding until he is certain that our financial support goes towards ridding the world of COVID-19¦ not aiding rogue regimes and covering up the truth.
**[Our president could use your support right now.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHoRiS08nf_uH7ckCjOP0vpFjr4P-ziQC_JP-8CzzjN2JCI1Jyt7s1hjsZlRERDOSfTR0j7-p-sE6pp8SKCinJcMkg0VGcrPLUwcmewErN5hhjuKJoqKcTUVHA4h9I-cDvTchaHMuDMhEXgDSeYtg72yZPbOy1suqiK_gZzr2oHWKxZms4G9cz6yZmUfM_dOa3-FkSOlccN_o-WqRSqtjqM7S9TvzU6fblcj95xg_7ca8Ex8V0v50i0DQwrQDKJojL0XP-n2RLZ2vlek_f8vPRcrit9GzWZj5xQerJzUmb2OTRgxhlNZxNt-sPINllw_tvwUnr3fxKlu_vjq1M77-g==&c=MfMZWpG15xDwqiZBqn_kM5GnzZ6-tMk1XPqIYNsb9kYgPd_7Whq8bg==&ch=WAfLCMaHHSHj_EGY6rpPgNhIl8s7EkqCfmXD69hYI1DoCfwD3srBLw==) **
I'm asking you to show him that you have his back, and that you support his decision to put AMERICA FIRST.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now to send the message that you are WITH our President?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHoRiS08nf_uH7ckCjOP0vpFjr4P-ziQC_JP-8CzzjN2JCI1Jyt7s1hjsZlRERDOSfTR0j7-p-sE6pp8SKCinJcMkg0VGcrPLUwcmewErN5hhjuKJoqKcTUVHA4h9I-cDvTchaHMuDMhEXgDSeYtg72yZPbOy1suqiK_gZzr2oHWKxZms4G9cz6yZmUfM_dOa3-FkSOlccN_o-WqRSqtjqM7S9TvzU6fblcj95xg_7ca8Ex8V0v50i0DQwrQDKJojL0XP-n2RLZ2vlek_f8vPRcrit9GzWZj5xQerJzUmb2OTRgxhlNZxNt-sPINllw_k-jDX1354PAtUIvt7HJZzA==&c=MfMZWpG15xDwqiZBqn_kM5GnzZ6-tMk1XPqIYNsb9kYgPd_7Whq8bg==&ch=WAfLCMaHHSHj_EGY6rpPgNhIl8s7EkqCfmXD69hYI1DoCfwD3srBLw==)**
John Cornyn \-----forwarded message below----- Friend, Ever since President Trump first hit the campaign trail years ago, he promised to put America First ¦ all the time.
Now, we find ourselves amid a global pandemic and nothing has changed.
When President Trump learned that the WHO may have mismanaged the response to COVID-19 and may have even aided the Chinese Communist Party in their deceit around the virus, our president CUT THEM OFF.
He believes that American taxpayers shouldn't foot the bill for an entity we may not be able to trust ¦ especially when the U.S. makes up a disproportionate amount of the organization's funding.
**President Trump needs to know that the American people have his back during these trying times. Senator Cornyn asked me to reach out to you to see whether you'd be willing to show our president that you are WITH HIM in his efforts to put America First. **
**[Will you chip in anything you can, right now, to send President Trump that message?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHoRiS08nf_uH7ckCjOP0vpFjr4P-ziQC_JP-8CzzjN2JCI1Jyt7s1hjsZlRERDOSfTR0j7-p-sE6pp8SKCinJcMkg0VGcrPLUwcmewErN5hhjuKJoqKcTUVHA4h9I-cDvTchaHMuDMhEXgDSeYtg72yZPbOy1suqiK_gZzr2oHWKxZms4G9cz6yZmUfM_dOa3-FkSOlccN_o-WqRSqtjqM7S9TvzU6fblcj95xg_7ca8Ex8V0v50i0DQwrQDKJojL0XP-n2RLZ2vlek_f8vPRcrit9GzWZj5xQerJzUmb2OTRgxhlNZxNt-sPINllw_KiSFIhOMGObUsZ0lqDqf5A==&c=MfMZWpG15xDwqiZBqn_kM5GnzZ6-tMk1XPqIYNsb9kYgPd_7Whq8bg==&ch=WAfLCMaHHSHj_EGY6rpPgNhIl8s7EkqCfmXD69hYI1DoCfwD3srBLw==)** [ **STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHoRiS08nf_uH7ckCjOP0vpFjr4P-ziQC_JP-8CzzjN2JCI1Jyt7s1hjsZlRERDOSfTR0j7-p-sE6pp8SKCinJcMkg0VGcrPLUwcmewErN5hhjuKJoqKcTUVHA4h9I-cDvTchaHMuDMhEXgDSeYtg72yZPbOy1suqiK_gZzr2oHWKxZms4G9cz6yZmUfM_dOa3-FkSOlccN_o-WqRSqtjqM7S9TvzU6fblcj95xg_7ca8Ex8V0v50i0DQwrQDKJojL0XP-n2RLZ2vlek_f8vPRcrit9GzWZj5xQerJzUmb2OTRgxhlNZxNt-sPINllw_hc2qBge1NIGxs7K9QTt50A==&c=MfMZWpG15xDwqiZBqn_kM5GnzZ6-tMk1XPqIYNsb9kYgPd_7Whq8bg==&ch=WAfLCMaHHSHj_EGY6rpPgNhIl8s7EkqCfmXD69hYI1DoCfwD3srBLw==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHoRiS08nf_uH7ckCjOP0vpFjr4P-ziQC_JP-8CzzjN2JCI1Jyt7s1hjsZlRERDOSfTR0j7-p-sE6pp8SKCinJcMkg0VGcrPLUwcmewErN5hhjuKJoqKcTUVHA4h9I-cDvTchaHMuDMhEXgDSeYtg72yZPbOy1suqiK_gZzr2oHWKxZms4G9cz6yZmUfM_dOa3-FkSOlccN_o-WqRSqtjqM7S9TvzU6fblcj95xg_7ca8Ex8V0v50i0DQwrQDKJojL0XP-n2RLZ2vlek_f8vPRcrit9GzWZj5xQerJzUmb2OTRgxhlNZxNt-sPINllw_MNExHnZdzjFkOAm7E-NMqA==&c=MfMZWpG15xDwqiZBqn_kM5GnzZ6-tMk1XPqIYNsb9kYgPd_7Whq8bg==&ch=WAfLCMaHHSHj_EGY6rpPgNhIl8s7EkqCfmXD69hYI1DoCfwD3srBLw==) President Trump needs to know that you are with him as he does everything in his power to keep Americans healthy, and to protect our nation's standing around the globe.

name: James Mackler
subject: Who can afford this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
$73,300 for health care is unacceptable.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa163/18d6a294/4cbc742a/26d617cd/2038710409/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | **$73,300.** That's how much it could cost for uninsured Americans to receive treatment for COVID - 19. Tenneseans can't afford that __and honestly, who could?__ At that rate, only the top 1% of our country could afford to stay healthy. **It 's unacceptable, and frankly, it's un-American -- especially in the middle of a health crisis. It's long past time to expand Medicaid. That's why I'm asking you to take a stand with me to demand Medicaid expansion.** [_**We need six more signatures from your area. Will you add your name today? **_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa163/18d6a294/4cbc742a/26d617ca/2038710409/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200425m") In service, James

name: Kamala Harris
subject: about Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We need to send Mark back to the Senate this November so he can continue this important work (and stay out of the kitchen).
|
---
| | Derek --

Senator Mark Warner needs help. No, I'm not talking about that **_[tuna melt monstrosity](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fe/53d9897e/54c19753/1c88687f/4001548854/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200425_f_1_nd__556__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")_** he inflicted on the internet the other day. Doug and I hopefully set Virginia's senior Senator straight with an Instagram Live tutorial on how to make a proper sandwich that doesn't involve a microwave or a pile of mayo.

I'm talking about the fact that Mark Warner is on the ballot this November, and we absolutely need to keep his seat blue if we're going to take back the Senate. Mark only won by less than one percentage point in his last re-election fight, and Donald Trump is personally targeting Virginia this time around.

**[So if you are able, will you chip in today and join me in helping Senator Mark Warner hold this must-win Democratic Senate seat?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fe/53d9897e/54c19753/1c88687e/4001548854/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200425_f_1_nd__556__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Here's the truth: Mark Warner is a truly terrible cook, but he's also an outstanding Senator. In his role as Vice Chair of the Intelligence Committee, we've worked together to hold this administration accountable and protect our elections from foreign interference. We've stood together to defend the Affordable Care Act, to provide safe housing for our troops and military families, and now in the efforts to combat the coronavirus pandemic.

We need to send Mark back to the Senate this November so he can continue this important work (and stay out of the kitchen). **[So if you want to take back the Senate as badly as I do, and you have the means right now, please make a contribution to help re-elect my friend, Mark Warner.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fe/53d9897e/54c19753/1c88687d/4001548854/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200425_f_1_nd__556__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Kamala

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fe/53d9897e/54c19753/1c88687c/4001548854/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200425_f_1_nd__556__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fe/53d9897e/54c19753/1c88687b/4001548854/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

**INSIDER TRADING ALLEGATIONS PUT GOP SENATE SEAT IN DANGER!**

_**FIRST : **_Un-elected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) attended a private briefing on the impending threat of COVID-19 - and instead of alerting the public, sold off MILLIONS in stock before the market crashed.
**_THEN : _**After coming under fire for potential insider trading, polling shows Loeffler locked in a dead heat with her Democratic opponent Reverend Raphael Warnock - in a race that _The Washington Post_ says is key to deciding Senate control!
**_NOW_**** _:_** We've learned Loeffler (R) has loaned a staggering $10 MILLION of her personal fortune to rescue her campaign, and Mitch McConnell is lining up the GOP establishment to keep this seat red and maintain his iron grip on the Senate.
**Friend, we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to flip this seat and take back the Senate, but the only way we 'll counter the GOP's megadonors is with grassroots support from people like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Trump Signs Coronavirus Bill Reviving Fund for Small-Business Loans | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6412f3ccd2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Signs Coronavirus Bill Reviving Fund for Small-Business Loans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20c2e28308&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“President Trump on Friday signed a nearly half-trillion-dollar coronavirus relief bill that replenishes money for small-business loans to prevent layoffs,” Steven Nelson and Ebony Bowden report. “The small-business program forgives loans if businesses with up to 500 employees, and in some cases more, don’t lay off workers.”

🎬 [President Trump: “We are marshalling the full power of the federal government!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d83494f621&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Rep. Andy Barr: Coronavirus — Congress, Make China Answer for Pandemic**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4eb8e274d1&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“As we continue to ‘flatten the curve’ and gradually begin to re-open the economy, the American people deserve answers about how this contagion started, how it spread and how we can prevent something like this from ever happening again,” Rep. Andy Barr (R-KY) writes. “The communists in Beijing put us all at risk.”
---
|
---
| **[How the Media Completely Blew the Trump Ventilator Story](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43e89c087a&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_National Review_
“After nearly four years of unrelieved Trump hysteria in the media, it’s hard to rank the worst journalistic outrages,” Rich Lowry writes. But how the press misreported the story of America’s ventilator stockpile “belongs high on the list.” Last year, America produced 30,000 ventilators. This year, it will be about 200,000—and they’re already coming in.

**MORE:** [**California Governor says “Promise Made, Promise Kept” by President Trump on testing swabs **](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b75e980bf&e=3ee4985eea "https://news.grabien.com/story-gov-newsom-says-promise-made-promise-kept-after-receiving-te")
---
|
---
| [**Trump Suspension of Immigration Over Coronavirus Will Protect Our Health, Jobs and Wages**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4573e0082e&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump is acting properly and justifiably to temporarily suspend immigration to the U.S. for at least 60 days in the face of the coronavirus pandemic,” former Acting Director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement Thomas Homan writes. “The left cannot continue to demand social distancing and delaying the return to work for some, while at the same time supporting more people coming to the U.S. now.”
---
|
---
| [**First Lady Sends Gifts to Hospitals Dealing with Coronavirus**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b023c7c583&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Associated Press_
“Melania Trump is sending blankets, caps and other gifts to hospitals in 10 states, including some hit hardest by the new coronavirus outbreak, for use by medical staff and children who are patients,” Darlene Superville reports. “Mrs. Trump met doctors and nurses at some of the hospitals during past visits to promote her youth program.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75e5e57d27&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9989730528&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=43f9ec3624)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265497/188453030/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QwMTgzMC0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wayd3pRZrgBxc9YuE5E-C0JdqtzH41Ye6r7MpSG3TTY=&emci=4bd01830-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=4cd01830-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
**“Sara Jacobs (CA-53) self-funds House campaign to the tune of $4.3 million”**
_\-- San Diego Reader, April 22nd_
* * *

Friend --

As we close in on the end of April, and our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we wanted to reach out and make sure you had the latest updates on our race.

**We'll start with the bad news: **Our opponent's quarterly fundraising report just went public, which means we got a jarring look at what we're up against. Sara Jacobs collected over $5 million for her campaign. $4.3 million of that total came from her own pocketbook.

**But there is some good news:** Our campaign has more donors. A lot more.

In fact, **11,120** people contributed to our campaign, and the vast majority of those donors chipped in small donations of **[$5,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265498/188453031/1147193815?refcode=em-200425-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QwMTgzMC0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wayd3pRZrgBxc9YuE5E-C0JdqtzH41Ye6r7MpSG3TTY=)** **[$35,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265499/188453032/1147193815?refcode=em-200425-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QwMTgzMC0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wayd3pRZrgBxc9YuE5E-C0JdqtzH41Ye6r7MpSG3TTY=)** and **[$100.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265500/188453033/1147193815?refcode=em-200425-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QwMTgzMC0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wayd3pRZrgBxc9YuE5E-C0JdqtzH41Ye6r7MpSG3TTY=)** That helped us report a very respectable $1.3 million.

Our opponent may have deep pockets, but we're building a people-powered movement made up of thousands of supporters who are ready to deliver progressive change in Congress. We’ll take that any day.

We fully expect our opponent to pick up the pace, which means we have no chance against all that spending unless we pick up the pace, too:

**[Friend, we’re humbly asking if you can add a donation of any amount to help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal. We wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t crucial to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265501/188453034/1147193815?refcode=em-200425-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QwMTgzMC0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wayd3pRZrgBxc9YuE5E-C0JdqtzH41Ye6r7MpSG3TTY=)** _If you've save your information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately._ | | | ****[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265502/188453035/1147193815?refcode=em-200425-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QwMTgzMC0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wayd3pRZrgBxc9YuE5E-C0JdqtzH41Ye6r7MpSG3TTY=)****

name: Team Tina
subject: Re: USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
| | Hey, Tina sent you an important email a few days ago. We wanted to make sure you saw it. **The United States Postal Service is a critical lifeline for millions of Americans. We cannot allow it to collapse, especially during this pandemic.** **[Sign our urgent petition demanding emergency relief to keep the USPS functioning through this public health crisis and the November election. Then, keep reading below for Tina’s message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265564/188454101/1248195719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWMxZjI5Mi0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKUl-T_MLPoDjT3496v9HtYEwxZT1pug13N7-9t63Qg=&emci=f1845e75-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aac1f292-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265565/188454102/1248195719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWMxZjI5Mi0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKUl-T_MLPoDjT3496v9HtYEwxZT1pug13N7-9t63Qg=&emci=f1845e75-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aac1f292-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
_\----- Original message from Tina Smith, April 22, 2020 -----_
Without emergency funding, the United States Postal Service is at risk of running out of money by June as the economic impact of the coronavirus continues to take its toll. Shortly after, it could collapse. But Donald Trump is refusing to provide relief.
Look, we need a functioning postal service, especially during this pandemic. Americans depend on the USPS to receive their wages, benefits, medicine, and now more than ever, mail ballots to safely vote from home.
**By weakening the USPS’s ability to deliver ballots, vote-by-mail will become nearly impossible — which would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters.**
That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you sign my urgent petition to demand emergency relief to save more than 500,000 essential workers’ jobs and keep the USPS operational? This fight is too important for Trump’s partisan games. Sign if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265566/188454103/1248195719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWMxZjI5Mi0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKUl-T_MLPoDjT3496v9HtYEwxZT1pug13N7-9t63Qg=&emci=f1845e75-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aac1f292-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)**
[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265567/188454104/1248195719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWMxZjI5Mi0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKUl-T_MLPoDjT3496v9HtYEwxZT1pug13N7-9t63Qg=&emci=f1845e75-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aac1f292-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
We cannot allow the President to leave hundreds of thousands of Americans without jobs and tens of millions without the important services they provide.
It’s critical we do everything we can to keep the USPS functioning throughout this public health crisis and through the November election.
**[You can do your part by signing your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17265568/188454105/1248195719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWMxZjI5Mi0yYjg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKUl-T_MLPoDjT3496v9HtYEwxZT1pug13N7-9t63Qg=&emci=f1845e75-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aac1f292-2b87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)**
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

St. Paul, MN 55114

| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zbEFlak3m83pZ0PtRaAlxP_wjMxm3TLg7kWZIq-JWGg=/gnBS5u0igv3LctudCMLXYGHkgp_fTsMsqAy7vyx0mBs=?refcode=200425-email) Peter, Our country, our state and our community are approaching a crossroads. We need to decide whether we will make progress on things like education, the environment and an economy that works for everyone, not just corporations, or if we allow ourselves to be pulled backward. **[Rita is a step forward. She listens to us, she cares about our issues and she works hard to find solutions. Help me help Rita raise as much as she can before her end-of-month deadline by donating $20 today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zbEFlak3m83pZ0PtRaAlxP_wjMxm3TLg7kWZIq-JWGg=/gnBS5u0igv3LctudCMLXYGHkgp_fTsMsqAy7vyx0mBs=?refcode=200425-email&amount=20)** | ****[CONTRIBUTE $20>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/zbEFlak3m83pZ0PtRaAlxP_wjMxm3TLg7kWZIq-JWGg=/gnBS5u0igv3LctudCMLXYGHkgp_fTsMsqAy7vyx0mBs=?refcode=200425-email&amount=20)****

name: Rob, Team Turner
subject: [Help Mike Turner protect Southwest Ohio from Nancy Pelosi]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Nancy Pelosi has been boosting Mike's Washington lobbyist opponent with massive amounts of online fundraising help and now we must do everything we can to prevent her from tipping the scales in this important race.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Our team is facing our most important fundraising deadline of this campaign to date at the end of April. [_**Can you help us reach our goal before April ends?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Nancy Pelosi has been boosting Mike's Washington lobbyist opponent with massive amounts of online fundraising help and now we must do everything we can to prevent her from tipping the scales in this important race. [_**Will you help us fight back against Pelosi to protect Dayton and Southwest Ohio?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
The new Ohio primary election date is in just three days. It's absolutely critical that we have a strong showing so that we shut down Nancy Pelosi's plans to defeat Mike Turner.
[_**Help Mike Turner protect this seat from Nancy Pelosi! Rush in $45, $35, $25, or even $5 to help Mike today! >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Because of the change in Ohio's primary date, we've had to readjust our strategy and factor in additional campaign resources because of the extension of the all vote by mail election being moved to April 28th.
[_**Please make a donation today to ensure Mike can continue to protect our district 's important needs! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Donate $100 to support Mike Turner!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $75 to support Mike Turner!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $45 to support Mike Turner!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate Any Amount to support Mike Turner!>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
Help Mike keep fighting for Dayton, the Miami Valley, and Southwest Ohio by [_**donating before both the primary and April ends!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,
Rob, Team Turner
**[**Donate Today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIzNTU1NjcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjY3MjU5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Help Mike keep fighting for Dayton, the Miami Valley, and Southwest Ohio by Thank you, Rob, Team Turner PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER 120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402 If you would prefer not to receive future emails,

Peter -- Mitch McConnell's right hand man, **Sen. John Cornyn, has been propped up by shadowy backers, corporate PACs, and special interests like the NRA his entire career.** Can we really trust him to have our best interests at heart when you can follow the money right to the votes he takes on health care, gun safety, and more?

We need a senator who we know is working for Texans, and that means we need someone whose campaign is powered by the PEOPLE, not the special interests. **MJ isn 't taking a penny from corporate PACs, and she's relying on our grassroots team of over 42,000 donors** to make sure that she can defeat Sen. Cornyn.

**Pitch in to elect a senator who will fight for US -- not special interests and DC bosses.**
