name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I just finished this NYT article about “ominous” GOP polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello — I just finished reading a bombshell _New York Times_ report on _“ominous”_ internal polling from Republicans showing Trump on pace to lose re-election and our campaign in position to flip this seat blue. Republicans like Mitch McConnell and his corporate donor network are apparently looking _“for ways to regain the advantage,”_ which we all know is code for more attacks on our campaign in the coming weeks. As you know, our grassroots donations have slowed a bit compared to the previous month. It’s understandable with everything happening, but if you’re able to step up today and help us get back on pace to hit our goals and fight back against the GOP’s attacks, it would mean a lot to me personally. **Our end-of-month deadline is on Thursday. clean_body: | Hello — I just finished reading a bombshell New York Times report on “ominous” internal polling from Republicans showing Trump on pace to lose re-election and our campaign in position to flip this seat blue. As you know, our grassroots donations have slowed a bit compared to the previous month. It’s understandable with everything happening, but if you’re able to step up today and help us get back on pace to hit our goals and fight back against the GOP’s attacks, it would mean a lot to me personally. name: Team Eugene
subject: PETITION: We must stand with survivors of sexual assault
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Content warning: This email discusses topics related to sexual assault.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17266273/188485800/1589362470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYyMjg4NS0zYTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GA76zOhvtcmaz6TK-s7gujLyBiy2oWwHw3Y2RpXE-yA=&emci=af7c4322-2387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=50622885-3a87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) Team,

**April is Sexual Assault Awareness month, and we’re standing with survivors by calling for action to end the nationwide backlog of rape kits.** It is estimated that as many as 200,000 rape kits sit unopened in storage facilities nationwide. These kits contain valuable evidence that could lead to justice for survivors of sexual assault.

As Auditor General, Eugene led the call to nearly eliminate the backlog of rape kits in Pennsylvania. By fighting to make sure rape kits were counted, he made it easier to track and address the issue statewide. His work led to a 90% decrease in backlogged rape kits in just three years. In Congress, he is committed to securing funding to help states address this issue and end the backlog nationwide.

[**Will you stand with Eugene to call for ending the backlog of rape kits nationwide?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17266274/188485801/1589362470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYyMjg4NS0zYTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GA76zOhvtcmaz6TK-s7gujLyBiy2oWwHw3Y2RpXE-yA=&emci=af7c4322-2387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=50622885-3a87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) | **[End the backlog »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17266275/188485802/1589362470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYyMjg4NS0zYTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GA76zOhvtcmaz6TK-s7gujLyBiy2oWwHw3Y2RpXE-yA=&emci=af7c4322-2387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=50622885-3a87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)**
---

The aftermath of sexual assault is traumatic and difficult -- survivors should be able to trust that the evidence collected will be processed in a timely manner, not sit in a storage facility for months. **We must stand with survivors by addressing the backlog of rape kits in Pennsylvania and across the country.**

[**Add your name to join us in calling for nationwide action to end the backlog of rape kits and ensure justice for survivors.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17266276/188485803/1589362470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYyMjg4NS0zYTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GA76zOhvtcmaz6TK-s7gujLyBiy2oWwHw3Y2RpXE-yA=&emci=af7c4322-2387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=50622885-3a87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) **[Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17266277/188485804/1589362470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDYyMjg4NS0zYTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GA76zOhvtcmaz6TK-s7gujLyBiy2oWwHw3Y2RpXE-yA=&emci=af7c4322-2387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=50622885-3a87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)**
---

clean_body: Content warning: This email discusses topics related to sexual assault. Team, April is Sexual Assault Awareness month, and we’re standing with survivors by calling for action to end the nationwide backlog of rape kits. It is estimated that as many as 200,000 rape kits sit unopened in storage facilities nationwide. These kits contain valuable evidence that could lead to justice for survivors of sexual assault. As Auditor General, Eugene led the call to nearly eliminate the backlog of rape kits in Pennsylvania. By fighting to make sure rape kits were counted, he made it easier to track and address the issue statewide. His work led to a 90% decrease in backlogged rape kits in just three years. In Congress, he is committed to securing funding to help states address this issue and end the backlog nationwide. | The aftermath of sexual assault is traumatic and difficult -- survivors should be able to trust that the evidence collected will be processed in a timely manner, not sit in a storage facility for months. We must stand with survivors by addressing the backlog of rape kits in Pennsylvania and across the country. Thank you, Team Eugene If you are a survivor of sexual assault you can contact the RAINN National Sexual Assault Telephone Hotline at 1-800-656-4673, or access RAINN’s online chat service at . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: | = Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Primary options: Vote absentee or in-person
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Due to COVID-19, it’s easier for all Hoosiers to vote by absentee ballot this election cycle. Tap or click to find out more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/we-still-need-you-469185?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=26faf93472&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Fellow Republicans,

Some things have changed in the last few weeks, but one thing hasn’t – the importance of making sure your voice is heard in our elections!

And there are a few updates to this year’s primary we want to share with you.

**First, our primary has been moved from May 5th to June 2nd. Second, in the primary ALL Hoosier voters have the option to cast a mail-in absentee ballot or vote in person.**

Voting by absentee ballot is an existing election process. And it’s an option for casting your ballot while practicing social distancing and staying healthy and safe during this pandemic.

**Just follow the instructions below to request and mail in your ballot.**
1. If you have internet and a printer, go to**[Indianavoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=80e1b23064&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
2. Click the “Get Absentee Forms” button
3. Click the “ABS-MAIL PRIMARY 2020” link to download the absentee ballot application and print it
4. If you don’t have a printer, call your county elections division and ask them to send you the application
5. Fill out the application and send the application to your county election division. The deadline to apply for an absentee ballot is May 21st.
6. You will get your absentee ballot in the mail
7. Fill out the ballot and return to your county election division.

**The ballot must be to the election division by noon on June 2nd, so we recommend sending it in at least 5 days prior.**

If you have any questions, call your county election division and they can walk you through the process.

**And, of course, remember -- early and Primary Day-voting options will also still be available. Early voting begins on May 26. If you'd like to vote in-person, visit ****[indianavoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0320712ce1&e=1acd9bb3d6) and check to see if your polling location has changed. **

**[You can also click HERE to sign up for all election updates, and make sure you never miss a thing.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b9ebd71f1&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

Regardless of how you cast your ballot, don’t miss out on this opportunity to get out and support our Republican candidates at the ballot box.

Thank you,

\- Indiana Republican Party
---

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: With your support we can elect Sri this year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
This week my team and I did a virtual town hall with the Brady Campaign -- a national organization that advocates for common sense gun safety reforms.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/c43an0p7MH52L6UWVhhTFqGdqEghKUBTgD08ArCrlVY=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.25_GG_b1_all&amount=22)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/BsLRkZBwBoy-T1LF5c3-73U-YV_k7OSpJ-IPv_GQ_64=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

I'm proud that Giffords PAC has endorsed Sri Preston Kulkarni. As a gun safety advocate who's seen first-hand the devastating impact of neighborhood gun violence, Sri is exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington, team.

That's why we are proud to support Sri's campaign for the US House to help us expand and protect our gun safety majority.

If we want to see our gun laws change, we'll need dedicated and tireless proponents like Sri on our side.

**So today I hope you will join me in supporting Sri 's campaign.**

[**Will you make a $22 donation to his campaign today? We need leaders like this fighting for us in Congress if we want to end the epidemic of gun violence in this country.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/MuwuOjHXkX9ljWvUtA_-qGStv5xjsEpt3UFToYoUghw=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.25_GG_b1_all&amount=22) | [DONATE NOW »](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/c43an0p7MH52L6UWVhhTFqGdqEghKUBTgD08ArCrlVY=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.25_GG_b1_all&amount=22)
---

Every year that passes we see more and more candidates stepping up to run for office with gun safety as one of their leading issues.

2020 is no different. We are seeing candidates running from the state and local all the way up to the presidential level that are making gun safety a priority.

I'm excited to work hard with all of you this year to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot who will be allies in our fight to end gun violence.

My very best,
Gabby Giffords
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/c43an0p7MH52L6UWVhhTFqGdqEghKUBTgD08ArCrlVY=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.25_GG_b1_all&amount=22)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/c43an0p7MH52L6UWVhhTFqGdqEghKUBTgD08ArCrlVY=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.25_GG_b1_all&amount=22)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/_f_Myjv9XavwGGvrkNTG4L9OeHloHpyrOMDgPqd0bTg=)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---
SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/MyOTIZHODLscEzJAVlrxe5rSuaoufIrV3T75TCFRpTo=/3AOoUwWPJFF-UzGpVvdvhilhEC_XuKcfzhRQwV1c0Ok=).

Already _thousands_ of people have chipped in to save this seat from a Republican takeover. We wanted to make sure everyone who is able to help out during these critical final days can, so we're going through our records before the end of the month.

Here's what we have for this email address:

body:
I need 20,000 signatures on my emergency petition to RESCUE the post office.
---
| | [**TRUMP THREATENS TO VETO EMERGENCY POST OFFICE FUNDING**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia") [I need 20,000 signatures on my emergency petition to RESCUE the post office. I will not allow Trump and his Republicans to bankrupt the post office and sabotage our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote them OUT -- in this election. Will you sign immediately? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia") | I can't overstate the urgency. Our post office is now inches from going bankrupt. [**If Trump and Republicans succeed in bankrupting the post office during this crisis, they 'll sabotage our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote them OUT of office.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia")
[**_I need 20,000 signatures on my emergency petition to RESCUE the post office and STOP Trump and his Republicans from stealing this election from us. I can 't overstate how urgent this situation is. Will you sign ASAP? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia")**** ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia")**
---

I need you to read this very carefully.

\- Our post office is now inches from going bankrupt.
\- Trump just threatened to VETO emergency aid to save it.
[**\- He knows without the post office, our ability to safely vote by mail -- and vote Republicans OUT -- will be ruined.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia")

Hear me loud and clear:

I will NOT let Republicans use this crisis to sabotage our election.

[_**I need a MASSIVE uprising -- 20,000 signatures on my emergency petition. The post office is CRITICAL to ensuring we can safely vote by mail in this election. We cannot allow Trump to sabotage the post office and force Americans to choose between our health and our vote. Will you add your name before midnight? >>**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feee/2874508796/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200425_em_pet_b1_poanvbrl_ia")

Thank you,

Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feef/2874508796/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feec/2874508796/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21feed/2874508796/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21fee2/2874508796/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21fee3/2874508796/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1b4/18e32a7f/4f5fd6c7/7b21fee0/2874508796/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: What you can do to help the Rhode Island arts community
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
In difficult times like these, art can be a source of comfort, strength and hope. That's something I think all of us need right now. Here in Rhode Island, the arts are fundamental to the very fabric of our state--to our culture and our economy. But right now, our galleries, studios and stages are dark. It's yet another heartbreaking reality of this crisis. So today I'm announcing initiatives to support artists across our state.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJzSE2IRoC5Yids51eYPKpdsyMkMDRNRfP3pnQ04BSPhQkHNmRpzHWPapKvhu5jHQB-mHV3uujP8HwG3WLWoAImimJhibafGaaEbCq8a1GB2x6I8VFv5jZIjyoatyS3VvIF6txRyNVjbgC0OW_BXzZFI=&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJzSE2IRoC5Yids51eYPKpdsyMkMDRNRfP3pnQ04BSPhQkHNmRpzHWPapKvhu5jHQB-mHV3uujP8HwG3WLWoAImimJhibafGaaEbCq8a1GB2x6I8VFv5jZIjyoatyS3VvIF6txRyNVjbgC0OW_BXzZFI=&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| I'm calling on Rhode Islanders of all ages to create and share family-friendly art -- drawings, poetry, songs, essays, photographs, videos, or any preferred medium - that's been inspired by this challenging time. To share artwork, take a picture or make a video and share it on social media with #RIArts. We want to hear from everyone. Creations can also be submitted via email or mail to the Rhode Island State Council on the Arts. [Go to their website for more information.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ5kqO-BFvjni5_lo1BGYh1Io2oau92oObBrpV_cRgLzxto6AUxia20p7nr3VIGpTdaRBVMcA7gm8mO3WeBLA9tpWA7r2qzjMGg==&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==)
We've also launched a new website, [RIArts.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ4gUm1q9tYALNZ82o0sGQJ0oybjU-rnwmTnxWkPxOfGp5syt_uRFK7pauqZ0Pac7237osgywd_04KPh5NCdrgig=&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==), to connect artists with available resources and provide Rhode Islanders with an up-to-date list of virtual performances happening in the state.
And in the spirit of sharing, I have to give a huge thank you to Shepard Fairey, RISD graduate, renowned artist and founder of the Obey brand, for creating a beautiful and inspirational image that he's called the "R.I. Angel of Hope and Strength."
---
|
---
| I spoke to Shepard a couple of weeks ago about how, despite the challenges we face, Rhode Islanders are coming together and showing incredible strength--from our healthcare workers and first responders to the neighbors stepping up to help someone down the street. We also talked about our state motto of 'Hope' and how we all need a bit of hope right now. Shepard got to work.
His latest creation, inspired by his time spent in Providence, is an image of leadership and resilience -- and it exemplifies our 'can do, roll up our sleeves' spirit. It is also available for free download on [RIArts.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ4gUm1q9tYALNZ82o0sGQJ0oybjU-rnwmTnxWkPxOfGp5syt_uRFK7pauqZ0Pac7237osgywd_04KPh5NCdrgig=&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==) so you can carry it with you. Make it the screen saver on your phone or your computer and remember to have hope. We're going to get through this together.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ5kqO-BFvjniyR1Dem9Hu8qyFmtl0h28YRB0rjFE1Nn_bHrbkYHenuwYiL5Uu4g8Xnkn1BpuFQXpo2Pznq8xih8cbPJitDaSbWR1MTwpvI97eL05jvVkUl6l6keGMhJSK3hwOSAPgKz9K-Bx42PdY909rqyR6OuSC0ZFJTfAsaMU&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==)
---
| A final thought: it's no secret that artists across the state right now are struggling. If you able to give, please consider the Rhode Island Artist Relief Fund. And thank you for everyone who has given. Since last Saturday, you've given more than $15,000 to this fund. If you're lucky enough to be in a position to contribute at this time, you can go to [www.ArtistCommunities.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ5kqO-BFvjni7dJOZNUuXLnFSpvtjoL1qapbzlBLtPbZ2ezcLtYT0uRWn_MMHDWqYrgc-EfpR-uwaRNl9Tyh6KkOZdvvjceTQ3sMgEw-Q2Mw&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==). And if you are a local artist who needs support, please visit the Rhode Island State Council on the Arts website, [www.risca.online](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ5kqO-BFvjni5_lo1BGYh1Io2oau92oObBrpV_cRgLzxto6AUxia20p7nr3VIGpTdaRBVMcA7gm8mO3WeBLA9tpWA7r2qzjMGg==&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==), to apply for funding.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ocp_8Sc9xiCfG0vA7Chc8iGgjgTnfsytwTNr17I64CFLPjsNirnfJ5kqO-BFvjnilhlyKxIyhsZhgNLDqOILvMRy88bSKMR2NhGrmnwHuoXPeoYD1ejOBt4Vc2gjqOR_As-TiAlrOwizAla-mfiivwzjm27TQ-PlfNePNK5ONcqhUCykVCK-LO5WKj6ltyZSo1L3TLs0hsXb1vtxGE6GAve41U6A5Ilj6GdnCHCJdZpeucmxjVX_ZsNRgbCPOpQvZWWgH_GUrFATuTNBnfyB7xusnqCENbA83WPCfTFhaxfA3ooEt6EdDlHgwafE2BSPN9zOlkSJCgU=&c=TIuYjEzaboXK57XOucHKYYdUgzFmfrdDRTD7qUyGcPG_VEAJmrNe5Q==&ch=mIuDCA8-1H4sqiaocPk_JSsC6d2grWe_F_gbFH8g5j7qr92VHKKybg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=a06d60d6-00ad-411a-9b69-5344483ca9fb)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=a06d60d6-00ad-411a-9b69-5344483ca9fb) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: I’ve had enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — I got into politics to fight for the issues that matter most to everyday families, like access to quality, affordable health care, good-paying jobs, protecting the right to vote, and building an economy that works for everyone. But it’s clear Republicans like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and my opponent Jason Lewis have a very different set of values. They refuse to take this pandemic seriously, and in doing so, have put countless lives at risk. Trump has fumbled any sort of federal response — instead focusing on his late-night tweetstorms and chaotic evening briefings. McConnell says states should go bankrupt rather than get further federal help through this crisis. That’s not all. My opponent made the dangerous decision to resume in-person campaign events and has called for Minnesota to prematurely reopen — ignoring health officials’ warnings and endangering the lives of our health care professionals, first responders, seniors, and countless others. I’m determined to keep Minnesota away from the GOP’s dangerous grasp. But if I’m honest, we have a very tough fight ahead of us. Republicans will do whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red and defeat me to hold onto their majority in Washington, so I’m asking for your help today: **If you’re financially able, please donate $10 or more to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: PETITION: Protect the Post Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc423/2a380d31/2204e1f3/f080af/3992059906/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc423/2a380d31/2204e1f3/f080af/3992059906/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
We sent a petition around earlier to save the U.S. Postal Service because right now, it's in grave danger. **It could run out of money as soon as September if Donald Trump refuses to authorize emergency relief.**
If this happens, it could mean job losses and wage cuts for postal workers across the country, reduced services to rural areas, and a dramatic impact on our elections as COVID-19 pushes us toward vote by mail.
We've set a goal of 5,000 signatures to save the Postal Service, and it looks like you haven't had a chance to sign. [**Please add your name to tell the Trump administration to stop using the USPS as a political bargaining chip.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc423/2a380d31/2204e1f3/f080a8/3992059906/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202004_saveusps?source=e20200425_usps2_RO&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
It's not hard to see why letter carriers and postal workers are so important. They're putting themselves in harm's way so that the rest of us can stay connected and receive critical supplies while our country struggles with COVID-19.
Still, Donald Trump is putting politics over safety and connectedness and we need your help to hold him accountable.
[**Please sign the petition to tell the Trump administration to fund the United States Postal Service.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc423/2a380d31/2204e1f3/f080a9/3992059906/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202004_saveusps?source=e20200425_usps2_RO&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc423/2a380d31/2204e1f3/f080aa/3992059906/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDQyNV9zYXZldXNwczJfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200425_saveusps2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Straight Talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn talks a lot, but he doesn't always give you straight talk.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890317/7f51f7bc/4f24ad4a/4ef10fcd/2638439074/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, Sen. Cornyn talks a big game when he's referring to what he's done to help workers and small businesses hit hard by COVID-19. The reality, though, is different. **Sick of a senator who 's all talk?** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890317/7f51f7bc/4f24ad4a/4ef10fcc/2638439074/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200425.3nd__1288__&amount=10")**
Sen. Cornyn likes to talk about the CARES Act and its expansion of unemployment insurance by an extra $600/week.

**In reality, he voted to strip that $600/week expansion.**

He promised that the CARES Act would provide "serious relief" for small businesses with limited bureaucracy.

**But the truth is that smaller businesses seeking relief have faced obstacles at every turn, while bigger (what he calls "sophisticated") companies leaned on their connections to access aid.**

If I say I'm fighting for something, I'm actually going to follow through. Texans deserve straight talk and a senator who'll actually fight for them, **[so donate today to support real Texan leadership, not double talk.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890317/7f51f7bc/4f24ad4a/4ef10fcc/2638439074/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200425.3nd__1288__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890317/7f51f7bc/4f24ad4a/4ef10fcc/2638439074/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200425.3nd__1288__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890317/7f51f7bc/4f24ad4a/4ef10fc3/2638439074/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1288&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890317/7f51f7bc/4f24ad4a/4ef10fc2/2638439074/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

subject: Michelle Obama as VP?!

body:
---
| | Biden will announce his VP selection panel THIS WEEK **Peter, do Democratic dreams really come true?** Joe Biden isn't only getting endorsements, he's giving them! _**This time to Michelle Obama!!!!**_ | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d8/72412298/4fade664/6104fdd7/812833781/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200425_MichelleObama_U1_X1?&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200425_MichelleObama_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200425_MichelleObama_U1_X1")
